descriptions.text: Paca Paca Passion is a rhythm game with dancers; however, this is very different then Bust A Move. I thank the closest game that I could compare this to is Beat Mania or Pop’n Music. There is a bar on the far left and right of the screen, a white line moves down this bar, and when you see a colored line on the bar, you press the corresponding button when the white bar moves over it.
